title: Pungent Pan-Seared Norwegian Pak Choi Stir-Fry
description: A flavorful and keto-friendly stir-fry dish that combines the bold flavors of mustard and garlic with the delicate taste of Norwegian pak choi.

ingredients.name: Pak Choi
ingredients.notes: Chinese broccoli or gai lan substitute

instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a wok over medium-high heat.
Add 2 cloves of minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add 2 cups of sliced pak choi and cook for 2 minutes until slightly wilted.
Add 1 tablespoon of Dijon mustard and 1 tablespoon of soy sauce, stir-frying for 1 minute to combine.
